collection.notes: product_info에 title/price/options/main_image 포함. 평점·리뷰수는 /next-api/review API(rData.ratingSummaryTotal.ratingAverage/ratingCount). 배송비는 quantity-info API의 moduleData>detailPriceBundle>finalPrice>bestPriceInfo priceWithDeliveryFee-price 차이. 이미지는 coupangcdn.com/thumbnails/ 또는 coupangcdn.com/image/retail 경로만 허용(로고·아이콘 제외). delivery_date는 product_info.shipping_period 또는 .pdd-contents
